target.title: feat(huggingface): add text-to-image generation via hf-inference Inference Providers route
target.body:
## Summary

Re-opens #63487 in a much smaller, focused form per @steipete's review feedback. Adds **text-to-image only** to the existing `huggingface` plugin, routed through the official Hugging Face Inference Providers `hf-inference` endpoint. No new credentials, no parallel HTTP stack, no out-of-scope capabilities.

Closes / supersedes #63487.

## What's in scope

- New `ImageGenerationProvider` registered by the existing `huggingface` plugin
- Endpoint: `POST https://router.huggingface.co/hf-inference/models/<repo_id>` (returns raw image bytes)
- Default model: `black-forest-labs/FLUX.1-Krea-dev`; recommended list also exposes FLUX.1-dev / FLUX.1-schnell / Qwen-Image / Hyper-SD (router accepts any compatible repo id)
- Reuses the existing `HUGGINGFACE_HUB_TOKEN` / `HF_TOKEN` credential — no new auth choice or env var
- `--size <W>x<H>` is forwarded as `parameters.width` / `parameters.height` per the [text-to-image task spec](https://huggingface.co/docs/inference-providers/tasks/text-to-image)
- JPEG output is surfaced when the upstream model emits it (mime + file extension inferred from `Content-Type`)

## Addressing the previous review

All five blockers from #63487 are handled:

1. **`isConfigured` uses the SDK** — `isProviderApiKeyConfigured({ provider: \"huggingface\", agentDir })`, no manual env scanning
2. **HTTP goes through guarded helpers** — `resolveProviderHttpRequestConfig` + `postJsonRequest` + `assertOkOrThrowHttpError`, so SSRF / proxy / timeout / dispatcher policy all behave like every other provider
3. **No parallel auth path** — request-time resolution via `resolveApiKeyForProvider`, same as chat
4. **Plugin manifest declares the contract** — `contracts.imageGenerationProviders: [\"huggingface\"]` in `openclaw.plugin.json`
5. **Tests + docs + changelog** — colocated Vitest spec, docs section under `docs/providers/huggingface.md`, changelog entry under the Unreleased section with `Thanks @lyfuci`

## Out of scope (deliberate)

Per maintainer guidance, this PR is intentionally tight. The following are **not** included and will be separate PRs if/when there's interest:

- Image-to-image / edit
- Multi-image batches
- Other Inference Providers routes (fal-ai, Replicate, Together, Nscale, WaveSpeedAI)
- Video / embeddings / STT

## Test plan

- [x] \`pnpm check:changed\` — 6 lanes green (conflict markers, typecheck extensions, typecheck extension tests, lint extensions, runtime import cycles, tests changed)
- [x] 7 new Vitest cases pass (default model, custom model + size, JPEG mime inference, missing key, upstream HTTP error, empty payload, capability surface)
- [x] Format check clean on the 6 touched files
- [x] End-to-end smoke test against the real \`hf-inference\` endpoint:
  \`\`\`bash
  openclaw infer image generate \\
    --model huggingface/black-forest-labs/FLUX.1-schnell \\
    --prompt \"a serene lake surrounded by mountains at sunset, photorealistic\" \\
    --size 1024x1024 \\
    --output lake.png
  # → 1024x1024 PNG, 800 KB, file lake.png: PNG image data, 1024 x 1024, 8-bit/color RGB
  \`\`\`
target.author: lyfuci
